verification_gate: Red tests prove snapshot verify, list, materialize, license, corruption rejection, deterministic build, and rollback; the rehearsal accounts for every peer capability and preserves each independent repository and lockfile; no release claim exceeds the bounded artifact.

gate_result.red_first: contracts committed red at nu_plugin 39fefee (stub library fails closed across all suites), implementation green at 50e1c84
gate_result.family_evidence: verify suite 7/7 (embedded verification, deterministic-ordered list, schema/summary bounds, license report covering every embedded component, flipped-byte and lying-manifest rejection, byte-identical double regeneration against committed assets, no secret-shaped embedding) and materialize suite 3/3 (byte-exact tree with modes, unsafe-overwrite refusal preserving existing content, corrupted-pack failure leaving no target — staging plus atomic rename)
gate_result.design_conformance: implements the CDB100 design doc layout and command contract exactly: verify/list/schema/summary/export/materialize/license-report over assets/{codedb-pack.zst,manifest.json,checksums.sha256,license-manifest.json}
gate_result.rehearsal_evidence: read-only walk of the CONSOLIDATE-003 contract: 3 retirement units with independent .git, reachable pinned heads (d7cc4d8/d47ca72/b2e0678), and preserved lockfiles; 19 adopted capabilities each mapped to a unit repo; 42 provenance peers accounted with the inventory's own worktree-transient classification honored (a gone transient worktree is preserved iff its parent clone survives — all seven such cases resolve to surviving parents); receipt committed at nu_plugin logs/consolidation-rehearsal/receipt.json with all_preserved=true
gate_result.bounded_evidence: the crate description, the receipt's bounded_claim field, and this proof all state the artifact is bounded; nothing was retired, merged, or cut over (the contract's own units are NOT-RETIRABLE/operator-frozen and remain untouched)
gate_result.full_suite: crate 11/11, workspace 287 passed / 0 failed, clippy clean
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: asset generation, verification, materialization, and the rehearsal all executed live; the rehearsal read the real spine contract files and probed the real peer repositories with git

proof_summary: ARCHBP-024 is complete: codedb-single-binary-export (nu_plugin PR FlexNetOS/nu_plugin#47, red 39fefee → green 50e1c84) delivers the CDB100-designed single-binary snapshot artifact — a deterministically generated embedded pack with manifest, per-file checksums, and license manifest, whose seven gate families all pass red-first: verify, list, materialize (staging + atomic rename rollback, unsafe-overwrite refusal, exact modes), license coverage, corruption rejection, byte-identical deterministic regeneration, and secret-shape exclusion. The read-only all-peer consolidation rehearsal accounts for all 3 retirement units, 19 adopted capabilities, and 42 provenance peers with independent repositories, lockfiles, and pinned heads preserved (transient-worktree entries resolving to surviving parent clones per the inventory's own classification), and its committed receipt carries an explicit bounded claim — no release claim exceeds the bounded artifact.
